context.projectOverview: Repair agent-bober's OWN code-graph integration so the CLI can talk to tokensave serve 6.1.1 (a standard MCP server, protocolVersion 2024-11-05). Sprint 1 fixes ONLY the MCP transport in src/graph/mcp-client.ts: drive an `initialize` handshake, use the tools/call envelope + unwrap result.content[].text, bump HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS to 5000. Sprint 2 (separate) will remap GraphClient's stale tool names. Root cause is fully documented in the contract assumptions and was reproduced this session.
context.probeHint: tokensave is on PATH (6.1.1). Confirm exact wire shapes by piping JSON-RPC into `tokensave serve`: an `initialize` request returns {result:{serverInfo,capabilities,protocolVersion}}; a `tools/call` for tokensave_status returns {result:{content:[{type:'text',text:'<json>'}]}}. Sending nothing leaves stdout empty (server waits for the client).
